findings: calendar_events now uses range_start/range_end instead of single-day bounds; single-date queries still work via start==end.
CalendarEvent gains attendees: list[dict] with name/email/responseStatus extracted from item.attendees.
Server endpoint accepts start= and end= query params, falls back to date= for backward compat.
Ctrl+G binding opens date input overlay; invalid dates show error toast without crashing.
